error.signature: illegal_argument_exception: Fielddata is disabled on [message] in [my_index]. Text fields are not optimised for operations that require per-document field data like aggregations and sorting.
error.regex: (Fielddata is disabled|illegal_argument.*fielddata|Text fields are not optimised|set fielddata=true|fielddata.*aggregat)

verdict.summary: Attempting to sort or aggregate on a text field. Text fields use inverted index, not doc values needed for these operations.

dead_ends.action: Enable fielddata=true on the text field
dead_ends.why_fails: Fielddata on text fields loads all unique terms into JVM heap. Causes massive memory usage and OOM on high-cardinality fields.

dead_ends.action: Convert the field to keyword type on an existing index
dead_ends.why_fails: You cannot change field type on an existing index. Requires reindex to a new index with updated mapping.

workarounds.action: Use the .keyword multi-field for aggregations and sorting
Add a keyword sub-field to the mapping and reindex
Use composite aggregation with keyword field for large cardinality
